repo.description: Running large language models on a single GPU for throughput-oriented scenarios.

terms.context_snippet: FlexLLMGen is a high-throughput generation engine for running large language models with limited GPU memory. FlexLLMGen allows **high-throughput** generation by IO-efficient offloading, compression, and **large effective batch sizes**.
